title: Zheng Li - Principal Software Engineering Manager @ Microsoft
description: 15 years building web & mobile software. Now rebuilding myself for the AI era.
tagline: 15 years building web & mobile software. Now rebuilding myself for the AI era.
bio: Engineering leader at Microsoft with over a decade of experience managing full-stack teams operating at massive scale. Leading a 15-person cross-functional unit focused on AI transformation, serving as a hands-on role model who bridges strategy with code.
